videos.title: How to Add a Favicon to Your Website
videos.description: Quick tutorial on adding a favicon to any HTML website using the link element.

videos.title: The Complete Guide to Favicons
videos.description: Brad covers everything about favicons including sizes, formats, and cross-platform support.

videos.title: SVG Favicons Are Awesome
videos.description: Kevin explains why SVG favicons are great and how to implement them correctly.

videos.title: Favicon Generator Tool Tutorial
videos.description: Learn how to use RealFaviconGenerator to create all the favicon files you need.

videos.title: Dynamic Favicons with JavaScript
videos.description: Kyle shows how to create dynamic favicons that change based on user interactions.

videos.title: Web App Manifest and PWA Icons
videos.description: Learn about the web manifest and how to configure PWA icons correctly.
